items: Welcome by the School Board President

Oral Communication - If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of Program Management Team Amendment #4 with Brailsford and Dunlavey
Approval of Multi-Prime Construction Agreements for Garfield School with Various Contractors
Approval of Drainage Upgrades and Bioswale Project Construction Agreement for Adelante Selby Spanish Immersion School with Silicon Valley Paving
Approval of IT Wiring Upgrades for Roosevelt School with Vanden Bos
Approval of Boundary Survey Project Authorization Form for Adelante Selby Spanish Immersion School with Kier and Wright
Discussion of Roadmap to Reopening My School Plan
Adoption of Resolution 1, Consent of the San Mateo County Special Education Local Plan Area (SELPA) Local Plan 2020-2023
Approval of Facilities Use Agreement between RCSD and Connect Community Charter School
Approval of Joint Use Agreement with Little Budz, Inc. dba BuildingKidz School at Hawes School Site

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 10.2 pulled from agenda because item 8.1 is discussion only. Items 10.3 and 10.4 moved to consent agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: So moved. Maria. Second. Is that Elisa? Yeah. Second. Okay. Thank you. So, Eliana, can we have a roll call vote, please?

items.intro_words: Started. Eliana, can we have a roll call, please?
Welcome, everyone, to our July 15th special board meeting.
So do we have any changes to the agenda?
Can we have a roll call vote, please? And Eliana probably needs to be unmuted again.
It looks like all of our speakers cards are for item 8.1, so we can move on to the bond consent.
Do we have a motion to approve? So move. Second, Dennis and Elisa, roll call vote, please.
Thank you, Dr. Baker. I'm going to share my screen. Let's hope all goes well.
Then we would need a motion to approve it. I'll second Dennis and Elisa. Can we have a roll call vote, please?
That brings us to the end of our agenda 1055. And we'll see you back here for our next.
